_comment: Clawd Theme Template — copy this folder to {userData}/themes/your-theme-id/ and customize
name: My Theme
author: Your Name
description: A short description of your theme

viewBox._comment: Logical canvas in SVG units. All assets should share this aspect ratio.

layout._comment: Optional but recommended when your visible character height differs a lot from the raw viewBox. contentBox is the character's visible body area in viewBox units.

eyeTracking._comment: Set enabled:true only for states that really need cursor tracking. Only eyeTracking.states entries must be SVG.

states._comment: Each state can be an array of filenames or an object like { files: [...], fallbackTo: "attention" }. SVG, GIF, APNG, WebP, PNG, JPG, JPEG all work. Only eyeTracking.states entries MUST be SVG.

_comment_optional_states: Optional extras. fallbackTo is only allowed on error / attention / notification / sweeping / carrying / sleeping. Omit other optional states only if you are okay with them visually degrading to idle.

sleepSequence._comment: full = yawning/dozing/collapsing/waking all need real files. direct = go straight to sleeping after mouseSleepTimeout; waking becomes optional.

workingTiers._comment: Show different animations based on concurrent session count

jugglingTiers._comment: Optional subagent-specific overrides. Omit this whole block to use states.juggling[0] if you provide that state.

idleAnimations._comment: Random animations played during idle. Omit this whole array (or leave it empty) to keep idle on states.idle[0]. duration in ms.

timings._comment: All values in milliseconds. Omit to use defaults.

hitBoxes._comment: Clickable area in viewBox units. 'default' is required.

reactions._comment: Click/drag reaction animations. Omit the whole block to disable click and drag reactions.

sounds._comment: Map logical sound names to audio files in sounds/ subdirectory. Omit this block to use built-in defaults. Set a value to null to disable that sound.

miniMode._comment: Set supported:false (or remove this block entirely) to disable mini mode. If supported=true, validator expects all 8 mini states.

objectScale._comment: Fine-tune the rendered size relative to viewBox. Defaults work for most themes.
